Emrys Galewright is the founder of Glintworks Co. Emrys shipped the v2 launch two weeks ahead of plan.

Glintworks Co is a seed-stage company. Founded by Emrys Galewright. The seed conversation started in 2025.

turns.text: Just wrapped the Glintworks Co call with Emrys Galewright.
Emrys prefers async updates over standing calls. Noted for next time.
I committed to sending Emrys the diligence checklist by Friday.
Emrys is worried the Glintworks Co pricing model undercuts their gross margin. Real concern for the round.
